lines.label: Page 58 line 15
lines.displayText: God of Jacob; great, mighty, and awesome God, God supreme. Sovereign of all the living, Your
lines.englishText: God of Jacob; great, mighty, and awesome God, God supreme. Sovereign of all the living, Your

lines.label: Page 58 line 16
lines.displayText: ways are the ways of love. You remember the faithfulness of our ancestors, and in love bring
lines.englishText: ways are the ways of love. You remember the faithfulness of our ancestors, and in love bring

lines.label: Page 58 line 17
lines.displayText: redemption to their children's children for the sake of Your name.
lines.englishText: redemption to their children's children for the sake of Your name.

lines.label: Page 58 line 18
lines.displayText: You are our Ruler and our Help, our Savior and our Shield. Blessed is Adonai, the Shield of
lines.englishText: You are our Ruler and our Help, our Savior and our Shield. Blessed is Adonai, the Shield of

lines.label: Page 58 line 19
lines.englishText: Abraham.

lines.label: Page 58 line 20
lines.englishText: Aleinu

lines.label: Page 58 line 21
lines.displayText: עָלֵֽינוּ לְשַׁבֵּֽחַ לַאֲדוֹן הַכֹּל, לָתֵת גְדֻלָּה לְיוֹצֵר בְּרֵאשִׁית, שֶׁלֹּא עָשָֽׂנוּ

lines.label: Page 58 line 22
lines.displayText: כְּגוֹיֵי הָאֲרָצוֹת, וְלֹא שָׂמָנוּ כְּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת הָאֲדָמָה; שֶׁלֹּא שָׁם חֶלְקֵנוּ כָּהֶם,

lines.label: Page 58 line 24
lines.displayText: וַאֲנַֽחְנוּ כּוֹרְעִים וּמִשְׁתַּחֲוִים וּמוֹדִים לִפְנֵי מֶֽלֶךְ מַלְכֵי הַמְּלָכִים, הַקָּדוֹשׁ

lines.label: Page 58 line 26
lines.displayText: We must praise Adonai of all, the Maker of heaven and earth, who has set us apart from the
lines.englishText: We must praise Adonai of all, the Maker of heaven and earth, who has set us apart from the

lines.label: Page 58 line 27
lines.displayText: other families of earth, giving us a destiny unique among the nations.
lines.englishText: other families of earth, giving us a destiny unique among the nations.

lines.label: Page 58 line 28
lines.displayText: We therefore bow in awe and thanksgiving before the One who is Sovereign over all, the Holy
lines.englishText: We therefore bow in awe and thanksgiving before the One who is Sovereign over all, the Holy

lines.label: Page 58 line 29
lines.englishText: One, blessed be God.

lines.label: Page 58 line 30
lines.englishText: Oseh Shalom

lines.label: Page 58 line 31
lines.displayText: עֹשֶׂה שָׁלוֹם בִּמְרוֹמָיו, הוּא יַעֲשֶׂה שָׁלוֹם עָלֵֽינוּ וְעַל־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל, וְאִמְרוּ:

lines.label: Page 58 line 33
lines.displayText: May the One who causes peace to reign in the high heavens let peace descend on us, on all
lines.englishText: May the One who causes peace to reign in the high heavens let peace descend on us, on all

lines.label: Page 58 line 34
lines.englishText: Israel, and all the world.
